assumptions: The intragroup dividend receivable gives rise to a foreign currency exposure in the consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge of an intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies fair value hedge as a hedge accounting model and separately addresses foreign currency risk on intragroup monetary items in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge of a forecast intragroup transaction
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies cash flow hedge as a hedge accounting model and separately addresses foreign currency risk on highly probable forecast intragroup transactions in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context separately identifies net investment hedge as a foreign currency hedge accounting model in consolidated financial statements and provides specific guidance through IFRIC 16.
